creator: jhs@berklix.com
text:
Fix
===>   Generating temporary packing list
/bin/mkdir -p /usr/local/share/xml/xmlcharent
install  -o root -g wheel -m 444 /usra/ftp/pri/host/fire/usr/ports/textproc/xmlcharent/work/*.ent /usra/ftp/pri/host/fire/usr/ports/textproc/xmlcharent/files/catalog /usra/ftp/pri/host/fire/usr/ports/textproc/xmlcharent/files/catalog.xml /usr/local/share/xml/xmlcharent
/usr/local/bin/xmlcatmgr -sc /usr/local/share/sgml/catalog.ports add CATALOG /usr/local/share/xml/xmlcharent/catalog
xmlcatmgr: entry already exists for `/usr/local/share/xml/xmlcharent/catalog' of type `CATALOG'
*** Error code 1

Fix: patch:
http://berklix.com/~jhs/src/bsd/fixes/FreeBSD/ports/gen/textproc/xmlcharent/Makefile.REL=ALL.diff

Avoid this error:
cd /usr/ports/textproc/xmlcharent ; make reinstall
===>   Generating temporary packing list
/bin/mkdir -p /usr/local/share/xml/xmlcharent
install  -o root -g wheel -m 444 /usra/ftp/pri/host/fire/usr/ports/textproc/xmlcharent/work/*.ent /usra/ftp/pri/host/fire/usr/ports/textproc/xmlcharent/files/catalog /usra/ftp/pri/host/fire/usr/ports/textproc/xmlcharent/files/catalog.xml /usr/local/share/xml/xmlcharent
/usr/local/bin/xmlcatmgr -sc /usr/local/share/sgml/catalog.ports add CATALOG /usr/local/share/xml/xmlcharent/catalog
xmlcatmgr: entry already exists for `/usr/local/share/xml/xmlcharent/catalog' of type `CATALOG'
*** Error code 1
How-To-Repeat: cd /usr/ports/textproc/xmlcharent ; make reinstall
